global_policy.minor: small point penalties, normally no cap
global_policy.major: relevant gap; penalty or cap typically 80/75
global_policy.fatal: patient safety, major QM breach, or ethically unacceptable action; caps typically 50/45/40 and may trigger critical_fail
global_policy.combination: strictest cap is the upper bound; additional major/critical/fatal errors subtract points inside that cap; caps never improve a score
global_policy.floor_logic: normal flawed attempts usually do not go below 25-30%; fatal safety/ethics errors may go lower
global_policy.follow_up_logic: Nachforderung can rescue part of the case, but does not erase primary-order caps; late therapy-decisive requests usually cap at 80-85.

records.combination_rule: strengster Cap gewinnt; weitere Critical/Fatal-Fehler geben Zusatzabzüge innerhalb des Caps; Cap verbessert nie
records.pass_fail_flag_logic: passed / borderline / critical_fail / incomplete je nach Score, Fatal-Fehlern und Abschlussstatus
records.decision: Strengster Cap 75%; weitere kritische Fehler: Zusatzabzug innerhalb dieses Caps; Cap kann Score nie verbessern.
